seo.title: Acupuncture for Insomnia — Natural Sleep Improvement
seo.description: Learn how acupuncture helps treat insomnia and sleep disorders naturally, without medication, by restoring the body's natural sleep-wake cycle.

title: Insomnia Treatment with Acupuncture
intro: Insomnia and sleep disturbances significantly impact quality of life, leading to fatigue, impaired concentration, and weakened immunity. Acupuncture provides a natural, effective solution for improving sleep quality without the risks associated with sleeping pills.

sections.title: How Acupuncture Improves Sleep
sections.content: Acupuncture regulates the production of melatonin, the hormone responsible for sleep-wake cycles. By stimulating specific acupoints, treatment calms the nervous system, reduces anxiety, and promotes deep relaxation. Studies have shown that acupuncture increases both sleep duration and quality.

contraindications: Severe psychiatric conditions without medical supervision

faq.q: How quickly does acupuncture help with insomnia?
faq.a: Many patients notice improved sleep after 2-3 sessions. A full course of 8-12 sessions is typically recommended for lasting results.

faq.q: Can I stop taking sleeping pills if I do acupuncture?
faq.a: Acupuncture can help reduce dependence on sleep medications, but any changes to medication should be discussed with your prescribing doctor.
